metadata.name: Analyze Potential for Heat Pump Adoption

description: A utility's electrification program manager wants to identify customers who would be good candidates for switching from a gas furnace to an electric heat pump.

nodes.task_description: Identify all customers who have both natural gas and electric service.

expected_outcome.value: System generates a list of dual-fuel customers.

nodes.task_description: Filter the list to customers with high winter gas usage, indicating they use gas for heating.

expected_outcome.value: System narrows down the list to likely gas heating customers.

nodes.task_description: Further filter the list to customers living in homes of a certain age, as they are more likely to need a new HVAC system soon.

expected_outcome.value: System creates a final, targeted list of high-potential candidates.

nodes.task_description: Generate a targeted marketing list for a campaign promoting heat pump rebates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces the final marketing list.
